raw_text:
54. Operations Manager (Tool Room)

Job Summary  
Responsible for overall operations of the tool room, including pro duction, maintenance, 
quality, and logistics.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Oversee daily and long -term operations  
• Manage production planning and execution  
• Ensure tool availability and maintenance  
• Optimize resource utilization and costs  
• Lead teams and improve operational efficiency  
• Drive continuous improvement initiatives  
Required Skills  
• Operations and production management  
• Leadership and team development  
• Analytical and decision -making skills  
• Process optimization  
Qualification  
• B.E /  B.Tech in Mechanical / Production (MBA preferred)  
Experience  
• 10–20 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹80,000 – ₹2,00,000 per month
